heading: Repealed. ,June 30, 1954, ch. 428, § 168 Stat. 336
label: 793a Repealed. ,June 30, 1954, ch. 428, § 168 Stat. 336
notes: Section, , , created a Model Housing Board, and provided for construction and sale of model houses and for creation of a revolving “model housing fund”.act Mar. 2, 1934, ch. 37, § 448 Stat. 361

Disposition of Moneys in Revolving Fund, , authorized transfer of any moneys remaining in revolving model housing fund under this section to treasury of Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.Act June 30, 1954, ch. 428, § 268 Stat. 336
